body.title: Inference web UI: show model version history
body.result: /api/inference/models/{id}/history + /inference/models page with inline history; 8 tests; c3b7d26b
body.description:
Gated on T-inference-models-versioned. Once versioned model entries exist, surface the history in the web UI so Akien can see how a model's capability profile changed over time. A simple expandable section on the inference device page: model name → current entry → archived versions (date, delta summary).

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py, templates or inline HTML
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log at INFO when history route is accessed
**Scope boundary:** In scope: read-only version history view for each registered model. Out of scope: editing entries from UI, triggering manual version rotation from UI.
**Completion criteria:** /api/inference/models/<id>/history returns list of versioned entries; web UI renders the history inline; tests: route returns history list; empty history returns empty array
